3.solution: First differences: 8,10,12,... (AP with d=2). Second differences constant → quadratic. aₙ=n²+bn+c. a₁=15: 1+b+c=15; a₂=23: 4+2b+c=23 → b=5,c=9. aₙ=n²+5n+9. a₁₀₃=10609+515+9=11133.

4.solution: Let α=log(8/5). Pattern: T₁=α, T₂=−2α, T₃=2α, T₄=−3α, T₅=3α,... Pairs: T₂+T₃=0, T₄+T₅=0,...,T₂₀+T₂₁=0 (10 pairs). Sum of 21 terms=T₁+0=α=log(8/5). Answer: C.

7.solution: Sequence: p,q,q−p,−p,−q,p−q,p,q,... Period=6. Sum of one period=p+q+(q−p)+(−p)+(−q)+(p−q)=0. 7112=6×1185+2. Sum=2 extra terms=a₁+a₂=108.66+(−29)=79.66. Answer: A.

8.solution: GP with first term 500, ratio r=1/6. Infinite sum=a/(1−r)=500/(1−1/6)=500×6/5=600.

10.solution: S₁₀=S₁₈ → S₁₈−S₁₀=0 → sum of terms 11 to 18=0. These 8 terms are symmetric about position 14.5, so a₁₄+a₁₅=0 → (a₁₄+a₁₅)/2=0. Answer: C.
